name: Brutal Pounce
description:
Pounce on an enemy with primal fury, dealing 1799 Bleed Damage and applying the Hemorrhaging status effect to all nearby enemies.

Activating the ability again within the next 5 seconds causes you to rip into all enemies in front of you to deal 1302 Bleed Damage over 10 seconds, dealing up to 450% more damage to enemies under 100% Health. Increases your Weapon and Spell Damage by 100 for each enemy hit, up to 6 times.
